pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly generates the file at this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated JStock portfolio data created by setup_task.sh at '/home/ga/.jstock/1.0.7/UnitedState/portfolios/My Portfolio/buyportfolio.csv'. The setup script injects exactly 3 records (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA) with initial broker fees of 0.0 and empty comments. The expected broker fee (2.99) and expected comment ('Fee Audited') align perfectly with the checking logic in verifier.py. The transaction details (units, price, and base cost) explicitly match the setup script inputs.
